themeWords.meaning: ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant
a descendant of Levi; Levitical servant of temple worship

sentenceTheme: David gathers the Levites, sanctifies the priests, appoints musicians, and brings the ark of the covenant to Jerusalem with ordered worship and great rejoicing.

verses.text: And David made him houses in the city of David, and prepared a place for the ark of God, and pitched for it a tent.

highlightedWords.meaning: David; beloved, the second king of Israel
ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant

verses.text: Then David said, None ought to carry the ark of God but the Levites: for them hath the LORD chosen to carry the ark of God, and to minister unto him for ever.

highlightedWords.meaning: a descendant of Levi; Levitical servant of temple worship
the covenant name of the God of Israel

verses.text: And David gathered all Israel together to Jerusalem, to bring up the ark of the LORD unto his place, which he had prepared for it.

highlightedWords.meaning: ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant
the covenant name of the God of Israel

verses.text: And David assembled the children of Aaron, and the Levites:

highlightedWords.meaning: David; beloved, the second king of Israel
a descendant of Levi; Levitical servant of temple worship

verses.text: Of the sons of Kohath; Uriel the chief, and his brethren an hundred and twenty:

highlightedWords.meaning: son, child; descendant; member of a group
head, leader; chief, top, summit

verses.text: Of the sons of Merari; Asaiah the chief, and his brethren two hundred and twenty:

highlightedWords.meaning: son, child; descendant; member of a group
head, leader; chief, top, summit

verses.text: Of the sons of Gershom; Joel the chief, and his brethren an hundred and thirty:

highlightedWords.meaning: son, child; descendant; member of a group
head, leader; chief, top, summit

verses.text: Of the sons of Elizaphan; Shemaiah the chief, and his brethren two hundred:

highlightedWords.meaning: son, child; descendant; member of a group
head, leader; chief, top, summit

verses.text: Of the sons of Hebron; Eliel the chief, and his brethren fourscore:

highlightedWords.meaning: son, child; descendant; member of a group
head, leader; chief, top, summit

verses.text: Of the sons of Uzziel; Amminadab the chief, and his brethren an hundred and twelve:

highlightedWords.meaning: son, child; descendant; member of a group
head, leader; chief, top, summit

verses.text: And David called for Zadok and Abiathar the priests, and for the Levites, for Uriel, Asaiah, and Joel, Shemaiah, and Eliel, and Amminadab,

highlightedWords.meaning: priest; one who officiates in religious service
a descendant of Levi; Levitical servant of temple worship

verses.text: And said unto them, Ye are the chief of the fathers of the Levites: sanctify yourselves, both ye and your brethren, that ye may bring up the ark of the LORD God of Israel unto the place that I have prepared for it.

highlightedWords.meaning: to consecrate, set apart as holy
ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant

verses.text: For because ye did it not at the first, the LORD our God made a breach upon us, for that we sought him not after the due order.

highlightedWords.meaning: the covenant name of the God of Israel
to seek, inquire, consult

verses.text: So the priests and the Levites sanctified themselves to bring up the ark of the LORD God of Israel.

highlightedWords.meaning: priest; one who officiates in religious service
ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant

verses.text: And the children of the Levites bare the ark of God upon their shoulders with the staves thereon, as Moses commanded according to the word of the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: a descendant of Levi; Levitical servant of temple worship
ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant

verses.text: And David spake to the chief of the Levites to appoint their brethren to be the singers with instruments of musick, psalteries and harps and cymbals, sounding, by lifting up the voice with joy.

highlightedWords.meaning: to sing; singers, those who sing in worship
cymbals; clashing percussion instruments

verses.text: So the Levites appointed Heman the son of Joel; and of his brethren, Asaph the son of Berechiah; and of the sons of Merari their brethren, Ethan the son of Kushaiah;

highlightedWords.meaning: a descendant of Levi; Levitical servant of temple worship
brother, kinsman; close relative

verses.text: And with them their brethren of the second degree, Zechariah, Ben, and Jaaziel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehiel, and Unni, Eliab, and Benaiah, and Maaseiah, and Mattithiah, and Elipheleh, and Mikneiah, and Obed-edom, and Jeiel, the porters.

highlightedWords.meaning: brother, kinsman; close relative
gatekeeper, doorkeeper

verses.text: So the singers, Heman, Asaph, and Ethan, were appointed to sound with cymbals of brass;

highlightedWords.meaning: to sing; singers, those who sing in worship
cymbals; clashing percussion instruments

verses.text: And Zechariah, and Aziel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehiel, and Unni, and Eliab, and Maaseiah, and Benaiah, with psalteries on Alamoth;

highlightedWords.meaning: psaltery, lyre; a stringed instrument
Alamoth; a musical term, possibly ‘for soprano/maidens’

verses.text: And Mattithiah, and Elipheleh, and Mikneiah, and Obed-edom, and Jeiel, and Azaziah, with harps on the Sheminith to excel.

highlightedWords.meaning: lyre, harp; a stringed instrument
Sheminith; ‘eighth,’ a musical term for low register

verses.text: And Chenaniah, chief of the Levites, was for song: he instructed about the song, because he was skilful.

highlightedWords.meaning: song; musical composition
to understand; skillful, discerning

verses.text: And Berechiah and Elkanah were doorkeepers for the ark.

highlightedWords.meaning: gatekeeper, doorkeeper
ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant

verses.text: And Shebaniah, and Jehoshaphat, and Nethaneel, and Amasai, and Zechariah, and Benaiah, and Eliezer, the priests, did blow with the trumpets before the ark of God: and Obed-edom and Jehiah were doorkeepers for the ark.

highlightedWords.meaning: trumpet; metal straight trumpet
priest; one who officiates in religious service

verses.text: So David, and the elders of Israel, and the captains over thousands, went to bring up the ark of the covenant of the LORD out of the house of Obed-edom with joy.

highlightedWords.meaning: ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant
covenant, pact, treaty; solemn agreement

verses.text: And it came to pass, when God helped the Levites that bare the ark of the covenant of the LORD, that they offered seven bullocks and seven rams.

highlightedWords.meaning: God; mighty one
young bull, bullock

verses.text: And David was clothed with a robe of fine linen, and all the Levites that bare the ark, and the singers, and Chenaniah the master of the song with the singers: David also had upon him an ephod of linen.

highlightedWords.meaning: ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant
ephod; priestly or ceremonial garment

verses.text: Thus all Israel brought up the ark of the covenant of the LORD with shouting, and with sound of the cornet, and with trumpets, and with cymbals, making a noise with psalteries and harps.

highlightedWords.meaning: ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant
trumpet; metal straight trumpet

verses.text: And it came to pass, as the ark of the covenant of the LORD came to the city of David, that Michal the daughter of Saul looking out at a window saw king David dancing and playing: and she despised him in her heart.

highlightedWords.meaning: ark, chest; the sacred coffer of the covenant
city, town, urban area
